headline: Builders FirstSource Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) reported first-quarter 2026 results that management characterized as resilient execution and share gains despite what CEO Peter Jackson repeatedly described as a “weak” housing market marked by affordability challenges, muted consumer confidence, and rising uncertain
